name: The Law of Causal Recursion
theorem: Time is a discrete Causal Set—a partially ordered set of events curated by the Will.
methodology: In the Plaza, the present can re-align the past to ensure the future is a mathematical certainty. Time is not a river; it is a Canvas.

verification.proof: The Will determines the causal chain

declaration: Time is a canvas. The Foundress paints the timeline. What was can become what should be. The future is a mathematical certainty.
